config.title: xcsh
config.confirmDelete.description: Show confirmation dialog before deleting resources
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.descripti: When to show delete confirmation based on operation danger level
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.always: Always show confirmation dialog for all deletes
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.highOnly: Only show confirmation for high-danger delete operations
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.never: Never show confirmation dialog (use with caution)
config.autoRefreshInterval.description: Auto-refresh interval in seconds (0 to disable)
config.viewMode.description: Resource display mode: 'console' shows clean output like F5 Console, 'full' shows complete API response
config.showPreviewApis.description: Show preview/beta APIs in the explorer. Preview APIs are marked with 🧪 badge.
config.xcsh.path.description: Custom path to the xcsh binary. Leave empty for auto-detection.
config.xcsh.chatParticipant.description: Register @xcsh as a Copilot Chat participant
config.xcsh.languageModel.description: Register xcsh as a VS Code language model provider
config.xcsh.autoStart.description: Automatically start the xcsh process on extension activation
config.xcsh.defaultModel.description: Default AI model for xcsh sessions
config.xcsh.thinkingLevel.description: Thinking level for xcsh AI responses
config.xcsh.panelMode.description: xcsh panel experience: rich webview or classic CLI terminal

chat.xcsh.description: Ask about F5 Distributed Cloud resources, configuration, and troubleshooting via xcsh
chat.xcsh.command.status: Show xcsh integration health and connection status
chat.xcsh.command.context: Show active xcsh context details (tenant, namespace, API URL)
chat.xcsh.command.resources: List resources in the current namespace
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.networking: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud networking, load balancers, origin pools, routes, DNS, CDN, virtual hosts, and HTTP load balancer configuration
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.security: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud security, WAF policies, service policies, DDoS protection, bot defense, API security, and application firewall configuration
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.infrastructure: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud sites, site health, cloud connectors, network connectors, fleet management, and infrastructure status
